# AteBit Tech — Retro & Vintage Computing Database
> Hand-curated directory of 732 retro and vintage computing resources — repair services, hardware vendors, YouTube channels, community forums, and more. Amiga to ZX Spectrum and beyond.

## Core Pages
- [Home / Directory](https://atebit.tech/): searchable, filterable directory of all 732 entries
- [Price Guide](https://atebit.tech/store/): search eBay sold listings, compare prices
- [Classic Version](https://atebit.tech/classic/): plain HTML, works on vintage browsers
- [About](https://atebit.tech/about.html): project background and contact
- [Privacy](https://atebit.tech/privacy.html): no tracking, no personal data
- [Newsletter](https://atebittech.substack.com): Substack updates

## Top Brand Pages
- [Commodore (135)](https://atebit.tech/classic/commodore.html)
- [Atari (126)](https://atebit.tech/classic/atari.html)
- [Apple (107)](https://atebit.tech/classic/apple.html)
- [Amiga (78)](https://atebit.tech/classic/amiga.html)
- [PC (58)](https://atebit.tech/classic/pc.html)
- [Sinclair/ZX (44)](https://atebit.tech/classic/sinclair-zx.html)
- [Nintendo (26)](https://atebit.tech/classic/nintendo.html)
- [Tandy/Radio Shack (18)](https://atebit.tech/classic/tandy-radio-shack.html)
- [Amstrad (17)](https://atebit.tech/classic/amstrad.html)
- [MSX (14)](https://atebit.tech/classic/msx.html)
- [All 39 brands](https://atebit.tech/classic/)

- [Community Hubs & Forums](https://atebit.tech/)

- [Internet & Networking](https://atebit.tech/)
- [Museums & Exhibits](https://atebit.tech/)
- [News & Blogs](https://atebit.tech/)
- [Podcasts & Audio](https://atebit.tech/)
- [Preservation & Archives](https://atebit.tech/)
- [Repair & Services](https://atebit.tech/)
- [Software & Games](https://atebit.tech/)
- [Vendors & Stores](https://atebit.tech/)
- [Web Tools & Browsers](https://atebit.tech/)
